autor: the heart knows. Memories abide in the body. They live on in the walls of our houses and in our objects. They are the sentiments which endure and sustain us in the infinite chambers of our hearts. Our hearts remember. Our hearts have this language. Our hearts sing.
explicacao: Citação de the heart knows. Memories abide in the body. They live on in the walls of our houses and in our objects. They are the sentiments which endure and sustain us in the infinite chambers of our hearts. Our hearts remember. Our hearts have this language. Our hearts sing. sobre temas ligados a sucesso. “Language makes us human” articula sucesso, suzy-davies, johari-s-window em registro de sucesso, com relevância para contextos como johari-s-window.
